brief_summary: Switch cross-section diagram for the H2 'What MX2A actually changed'. Three bordeaux-numbered callouts on the right margin point to the three internal changes: (1) tighter stem rails picked out in bordeaux dotted dashes, (2) factory grease ring at the stem-housing seam as a bordeaux dot-band, (3) retuned spring with bordeaux tinting on the end coils. Each callout includes the change name and a one-line note pulled directly from the article body.
data_sources: cherry-mx2a-revision.mdx § 'What MX2A actually changed' — 'stem and housing rails were retooled with tighter tolerances ... Cherry introduced a factory grease ring around the stem rails ... spring was retuned for the new internal geometry'
